creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
You can now pass TSA Security Check Points without a Plane Ticket and Here’s Why…

#Airport #travel #flight #Airlines #security

transcription.text: You can now go through TSA security checks without a plane ticket, and here's why. For the first time since September 11, 2001, visitors are now allowed to greet their family and friends at the arrival gate. It's not a free-for-all, but here's how it works. You'll apply online for a guest pass with some qualifying questions, and then be given a digital pass so that you can greet your family and friends when they arrive. You can apply up to seven days in advance, with some airports offering approval within 15 minutes. Here are the list of airports that have implemented this so far, but the list will continue to grow. Let me know your thoughts in the comments, and also, are you going to try this out?
